status.message: Multiple operational failures are actively reducing store profitability

execution_required.title: EXECUTION REQUIRED
execution_required.message: Failure to act results in compounding daily revenue loss

inaction_risk.message: If no action is taken, you will lose approximately $28301.00 in the next 7 days

actions.title: RECOVER LOST CUSTOMERS ($370.99/DAY)
actions.context: 5 high-value customers are going quiet — last order 70 days ago on average

execution.primary: Send a personal email from the store owner account to each VIP customer with an exclusive offer

steps: Shopify → Analytics → Reports → Identify the biggest daily loss driver
Shopify → Products / Orders → Execute the specific fix on the flagged items
Ads Manager → Pause spend on any campaign tied to the loss driver

expected_outcome.message: Recover up to $11129.79 by fixing this issue

risk_if_ignored.message: You will lose approximately $2596.93 in the next 7 days if no action is taken

actions.title: STOP DAILY CASH LOSS ($363.97/DAY)
actions.context: 2 SKUs have inventory >0 and zero sales in the last 90 days
targets: The Multi (SKU: sku-managed-1) — inventory: 27 units — sales: 0 in last 90d
The Collection Snowboard: Liquid — inventory: 21 units — sales: 0 in last 90d

execution.primary: Create automatic discount (15%) and bundle offer for listed SKUs

steps: Shopify → Products → Discounts → Create 15% discount for listed SKUs
Shopify → Bundles / Apps → Create bundle offer for dead inventory listed SKUs
Shopify → Products → Inventory → Verify on-hand quantity + adjust if needed
Ads Manager → Pause campaigns promoting listed SKUs until sell-through improves

expected_outcome.message: Recover up to $32757.60 by fixing this issue

risk_if_ignored.message: You will lose approximately $2547.79 in the next 7 days if no action is taken

actions.title: STOP CASH LEAK ($134.24/DAY)
actions.context: 60 checkouts abandoned this week — $6264.74 left at the door
targets: 60 checkouts abandoned this week — $6264.74 left at the door

execution.primary: Send a 2-email abandoned cart sequence: immediate recovery email at 1 hour, discount offer at 24 hours

steps: Shopify → Settings → Checkout → Review shipping, payments, and checkout branding
Shopify → Analytics → Checkout behavior → Identify the biggest drop-off step
Ads Manager → Retargeting → Ensure abandoned checkout retargeting is running
Email/CRM → Flows → Abandoned checkout → Enable and verify send timing (1h / 12h / 24h)

expected_outcome.message: Recover up to $6264.74 by fixing this issue

risk_if_ignored.message: You will lose approximately $939.68 in the next 7 days if no action is taken

actions.consequence: Checkout friction is blocking revenue capture
